title: Eye of Deth
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Eye of Deth''' was the name of a great green gemstone that belonged to the mercantile warlord [[Deth Korakill]].

==History==
When Korakill was murdered by the [[Yevetha]] during their [[Yevethan Purge|purge]] of the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]], the gem was taken by the Yevethans and later placed in a trophy room onboard the [[Aramadia (Super Star Destroyer)|''Aramadia'']].
There, the gem gained its name from its deceased owner.<ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

==Sources==
